artifacts.name: skill-embeddings-intuition
artifacts.description: Helps an AI assistant explain embedding concepts, debug embedding-related retrieval failures, and reason about vector similarity.

artifacts.name: prompt-embedding-model-selector
artifacts.description: Expert advisor prompt for choosing an embedding model given constraints: latency, cost, domain, language, and scale.

artifacts.name: skill-vector-store-setup
artifacts.description: Guides setting up a vector store for a production use case, covering the full decision path from in-memory local development through hosted Qdrant and pgvector.

artifacts.name: skill-chunking-strategy-picker
artifacts.description: Expert advisor for choosing a chunking strategy given document type and retrieval use case, including a decision table and failure mode checklist.

artifacts.name: prompt-rag-debugger
artifacts.description: Systematic prompt for diagnosing a broken RAG pipeline. Given a symptom, maps it to the broken step and provides a diagnostic checklist.

artifacts.name: skill-retrieval-evaluator
artifacts.description: Guides the process of computing and interpreting retrieval metrics for any RAG system, from building a golden dataset through diagnosing what to fix.

artifacts.name: skill-hybrid-search-builder
artifacts.description: Guides choosing and implementing the right hybrid search configuration for a specific RAG use case, with decision guidance and a tuning workflow.

artifacts.name: prompt-query-transformer
artifacts.description: Advises which query transformation technique to apply to a given query and retrieval system, with recommendations and exact prompts to use.

artifacts.name: prompt-citation-formatter
artifacts.description: Reusable system prompt template for formatting LLM responses with inline citations grounded in retrieved source documents.

artifacts.name: skill-rag-eval-harness
artifacts.description: Skill for setting up a RAG evaluation harness that measures faithfulness, answer relevance, and context relevance across the RAG Triad.

artifacts.name: skill-advanced-rag-selector
artifacts.description: Selects the appropriate advanced RAG pattern (reranking, HyDE, parent-child chunking, etc.) given a specific retrieval failure mode.

artifacts.name: skill-agentic-rag-loop
artifacts.description: Implements the agentic RAG loop pattern where the model iteratively retrieves, reasons, and decides whether to retrieve again before answering.

artifacts.name: skill-text-to-sql
artifacts.description: Guides building a Text-to-SQL pipeline with safety controls, schema injection patterns, and evaluation for structured data retrieval.

artifacts.name: skill-codebase-rag
artifacts.description: Builds a codebase Q&A system using AST-aware chunking, symbol search, and incremental indexing for accurate code retrieval.

artifacts.name: prompt-rag-framework-chooser
artifacts.description: Decision prompt for choosing between LlamaIndex, LangChain, or a raw implementation given project requirements, team constraints, and complexity.

artifacts.name: service-template
artifacts.description: Production-ready FastAPI RAG service with document ingestion, hybrid retrieval, LLM generation, evaluation, and health monitoring.

artifacts.name: skill-agent-loop
artifacts.description: Copy-paste ready agent loop template with tool registry, dispatch pattern, and message history management for production agents.

artifacts.name: prompt-workflow-vs-agent-decision
artifacts.description: Decision prompt and rubric for classifying a task as workflow, agent, or multi-agent before building.

artifacts.name: skill-prompt-chaining
artifacts.description: Gated prompt chain pattern: sequential LLM steps with typed interfaces, quality gates, and per-step retry logic.

artifacts.name: skill-router
artifacts.description: Intent classification prompt and Router class with registered handlers, fallback, and model-tiering by intent complexity.

artifacts.name: skill-parallelization
artifacts.description: Sectioning and voting parallelization templates using asyncio.gather and ThreadPoolExecutor with rate-limit semaphore.

artifacts.name: skill-orchestrator-workers
artifacts.description: Orchestrator system prompt template and worker dispatch pattern for multi-specialist LLM pipelines.

artifacts.name: skill-evaluator-optimizer
artifacts.description: Generator, evaluator, and optimizer prompt templates for self-improving LLM output loops with structured rubric scoring.

artifacts.name: skill-tool-recovery
artifacts.description: Production tool executor with typed error classification, retry logic, and structured error messages back to the LLM.

artifacts.name: skill-agent-memory
artifacts.description: MemoryManager combining sliding-window in-context, key-value long-term, and semantic retrieval memory in one per-turn interface.

artifacts.name: skill-react-planner
artifacts.description: ReAct system prompt, thought parser, and plan-and-execute two-phase pattern with diagnostic thought log.

artifacts.name: skill-agent-governor
artifacts.description: AgentGovernor class enforcing max iterations, token budget, wall-clock timeout, soft stop, and async kill switch.

artifacts.name: prompt-sdk-tradeoffs
artifacts.description: Five-question SDK selection rubric, comparison table, and task-to-SDK mapping for raw SDK vs Agents SDK vs LangGraph decisions.

artifacts.description: Supervisor prompt template, specialist dispatch pattern, and handoff context format for multi-agent pipelines.

artifacts.description: Approval gate pattern with tool tagging, interrupt-and-resume state serialization, and confidence-threshold escalation.
